basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Assistant Security Officer. Candidates with any graduate Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BEL official website bel-india.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in any discipline (Pass Class from a recognized University)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: BEL Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
